index.title: Sending domains
index.description: Verify the domains you send mail from.
index.emptyMessage: Add a domain to publish its DNS records and start sending.

create.title: Add a sending domain
create.description: Enter the domain you want to send mail from. You will be shown the DNS records to publish.
create.success: Domain added. Publish its DNS records to verify it.

detail.verifiedMessage: Verified {{date}}. You can send campaigns and transactional mail from this domain.
detail.dnsDescription: Publish these records at your DNS provider. Verification runs automatically once they are visible.
